programme.title: Valentine's Town
programme.desc: Working for a popular dating app, Jude heads up the company's plan to build a tacky, love themed resort in Arrowheart, his hometown. Standing in their way is a local business owner, Melissa the Matchmaker, who has rallied the town's residents against the resort. Upon Jude's return to Arrowheart he is shocked to discover that Melissa is his old high school love.

programme.title: A Match for the Prince
programme.desc: A medieval romance novelist is hired to be a matchmaker for a real-life prince in a desperate attempt to find true love before the fixed royal wedding date.

programme.title: A Toast to Love
programme.desc: A marine archaeologist works on a shipwreck, uncovers a romantic tale behind a wine discovery and sparks a romance with a Spanish winemaker.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: Search & Seized
programme.desc: Every year, Jennifer and her friend Miles Wexford participate in the organization of an auction of goods seized by the police. The night of the auction, Miles is found dead in his store. Every clue points to suicide, but there is more to it. Jennifer learns that he was in serious debt due to a gambling problem.

programme.title: Valentine's Town
programme.desc: Working for a popular dating app, Jude heads up the company's plan to build a tacky, love themed resort in Arrowheart, his hometown. Standing in their way is a local business owner, Melissa the Matchmaker, who has rallied the town's residents against the resort. Upon Jude's return to Arrowheart he is shocked to discover that Melissa is his old high school love.

programme.title: A Match for the Prince
programme.desc: A medieval romance novelist is hired to be a matchmaker for a real-life prince in a desperate attempt to find true love before the fixed royal wedding date.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Ty is admitted to the hospital, Amy and the family come together.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A trip to a fishing camp goes awry and proves to be a life-changing weekend.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty struggles with control issues when his mom stops by for an unexpected visit, in hopes of bonding with her granddaughter.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: The family supports Georgie as she decides whether to face a ghost from her past.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: When Hope Calls: Brookfield
programme.desc: Nora's relationship with Fletcher is tested; Hannah notices Wyatt and Lucie growing closer; Sam weighs his professional option.

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: A reluctant billionaire goes to Bali as a donor and meets a beautiful female doctor working there. Both leave their prejudices behind and fall in love.

programme.title: When Hope Calls: Brookfield
programme.desc: Nora's relationship with Fletcher is tested; Hannah notices Wyatt and Lucie growing closer; Sam weighs his professional option.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty struggles with control issues when his mom stops by for an unexpected visit, in hopes of bonding with her granddaughter.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: The family supports Georgie as she decides whether to face a ghost from her past.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: A Royal Recipe for Love
programme.desc: When Emma, a baker in NYC, is hired to bake for the king and queen of Sanovia's anniversary party, she is convinced a good job will lead to her landing a cookbook deal.

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: A reluctant billionaire goes to Bali as a donor and meets a beautiful female doctor working there. Both leave their prejudices behind and fall in love.

programme.title: Love on Your Doorstep
programme.desc: A talented TV host show profiles a local florist with a groundbreaking same-day-delivery florist service and a long-running flower competition for a chance to land her own show.

programme.title: Lease on Love
programme.desc: Poppy is a marketing specialist whose life is turned upside down when she fakes an engagement with her boss's handsome new client Milo, to win over her strict building manager and get Milo the penthouse suite.

programme.title: Steal Your Heart
programme.desc: A mix up over a purchase leaves amateur jeweler Melissa being enlisted by the CEO of the biggest jewelry company in Miami to help create a bridal line with the CEO's too-serious son, Jake.

programme.title: When Hope Calls: Brookfield
programme.desc: Nora's relationship with Fletcher is tested; Hannah notices Wyatt and Lucie growing closer; Sam weighs his professional option.

programme.title: Love on Your Doorstep
programme.desc: A talented TV host show profiles a local florist with a groundbreaking same-day-delivery florist service and a long-running flower competition for a chance to land her own show.

programme.title: When Hope Calls: Brookfield
programme.desc: Nora's relationship with Fletcher is tested; Hannah notices Wyatt and Lucie growing closer; Sam weighs his professional option.

programme.title: Lease on Love
programme.desc: Poppy is a marketing specialist whose life is turned upside down when she fakes an engagement with her boss's handsome new client Milo, to win over her strict building manager and get Milo the penthouse suite.

programme.title: Steal Your Heart
programme.desc: A mix up over a purchase leaves amateur jeweler Melissa being enlisted by the CEO of the biggest jewelry company in Miami to help create a bridal line with the CEO's too-serious son, Jake.

programme.desc: Ty struggles with control issues when his mom stops by for an unexpected visit, in hopes of bonding with her granddaughter.

programme.desc: The family supports Georgie as she decides whether to face a ghost from her past.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim steps up Jade's training regimen when a new competitor shows up.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty prepare an unruly wild horse for international transport.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: When a no-nonsense consultant is blindsided by her boss's switch to a greener, more natural office space, she'll partner with the rooftop florist to make her building come alive with the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: A reluctant billionaire goes to Bali as a donor and meets a beautiful female doctor working there. Both leave their prejudices behind and fall in love.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: When Tiffany's fiancé calls off their wedding, she's heartbroken that her dream wedding is cancelled. Tiffany convinces unsuccessful actor Nicholas to pretend to be her fiancé in exchange for signing him to her agency, and the dream wedding happens for someone.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim steps up Jade's training regimen when a new competitor shows up.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty prepare an unruly wild horse for international transport.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: When a no-nonsense consultant is blindsided by her boss's switch to a greener, more natural office space, she'll partner with the rooftop florist to make her building come alive with the beauty of nature.

programme.title: The Confession
programme.desc: Hoping to inherit his dying wife's estate, a man hatches a plan and hires an actress to pose as her long lost daughter.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: When Tiffany's fiancé calls off their wedding, she's heartbroken that her dream wedding is cancelled. Tiffany convinces unsuccessful actor Nicholas to pretend to be her fiancé in exchange for signing him to her agency, and the dream wedding happens for someone.

programme.title: The Movie Star and the Cowboy
programme.desc: When city girl and actress, Isabella, lands a dream role as a rancher, the studio sends her to live on a ranch to learn the ropes, but she soon discovers the rancher, Hunter, is too busy trying to save his ranch from ruin.

programme.title: The Soulmate Search
programme.desc: When Lindsay gets the chance to sign up to the notoriously exclusive dating service Eternity, she clashes with Will, her first date. They mutually agree that the dating service is a complete bust and make a deal to get their money back.

programme.title: Sugarcreek Amish Mysteries: Blessings in Disguise
programme.desc: After Cheryl's three-year engagement ends in a devastating breakup, her life is turned upside down when her aunt offers her an escape from Chicago to the Amish town of Sugarcreek. Struggling with being a fish out of water, Cheryl uncovers an unsettling secret that could disrupt the small town of Ohio. As Cheryl begins to solve the mystery, she finds community, belonging and the potential of new love.

programme.title: Passport to Love
programme.desc: Travel blogger Nicole meets Kade, a competing magazine rep while travelling abroad. When Kade's boss tasks him with buying her out, he struggles between doing his job and his growing feelings for Nicole.
